positive: A celestial guardian mask integrated with overgrown botanical elements, depicted in a symmetrical, stylized Art Nouveau manner. The main subject is a dramatic, intricate mask silhouette made of interwoven vines, peacock feathers, and luminous lunar crescents. Use highly contrasting colors: deep indigo and midnight blue backgrounds contrasted sharply with glowing gold leaf accents, emerald green foliage, and pearlescent white highlights. The composition must be highly centered and suitable for a repeating motif or single central graphic, minimizing gradients and maximizing crisp linework. Cinematic, overhead view, strong backlighting emphasizes the mask's contours, giving it a three-dimensional pop art feel. Perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: low detail, blurry, bad anatomy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, grain, noise, out of frame, extra limbs, poorly rendered, messy, realistic photography, bokeh, gradient fade
